jobs.title: Senior Data Science/ML Engineer - Financial Crime
match_reasons: Strong experience in building and shipping production ML systems end-to-end, aligning with the core responsibility of the role.

dbt production depth is limited, which is a key skill for analytics engineering and feature development.
Deep causal inference knowledge is a gap, but foundations are present.
